sections.content: Single-window for 100+ central and state scholarship schemes. Covers pre-matric, post-matric, merit-cum-means, top-class education for SC/ST/OBC/minorities/disabled. Over 3 crore applications processed annually. Amount: Rs 5,000 to Rs 2,00,000/year depending on scheme.

Key schemes: (1) Post-Matric Scholarship for SC (tuition + maintenance). (2) Pre-Matric Scholarship for Minorities (Class 1-10, Rs 5,400-10,700/year). (3) Central Sector Scheme for top 20% of 12th pass (Rs 12,000-20,000/year for 3 years). (4) PM Scholarship for wards of ex-servicemen. (5) National Means-cum-Merit (NMMS) for Class 9-12 (Rs 12,000/year). (6) Inspire scholarship for science (Rs 80,000/year).

Steps: (1) Register on scholarships.gov.in (Aadhaar + mobile + bank). (2) Select scheme. (3) Fill application with academic + income details. (4) Upload: income cert, caste cert, marksheets, bank passbook, Aadhaar, institution verification letter. (5) Institute verifies. (6) District/state verifies. (7) Amount credited to bank via DBT. Timeline: Apply July-Nov (fresh), renewal by March.

Rejections: bank account not matching Aadhaar-seeded name, income certificate expired/wrong format, institute not verified on NSP, missed deadline, PFMS validation failure. Tips: ensure bank is PFMS-active, use income cert from current year, get institute to verify early, apply in first week of portal opening.
